response.global_analysis: Vocal audio phonetically matches the 'Aishite Aishite Aishite' lyrics. Dialogue in the first half was transcribed directly from audio as it is not present in the reference JSON. On-screen text for the song title and credits was used for secondary priority transcription. Timestamps were strictly aligned to vocal start/end points to prevent cascading sync issues, with segments split to maintain readability under the 50-character limit.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: そしてね、あの衣装もシナジーがあるってわけで…
subtitles.english: And you see, our outfits also have synergy...

subtitles.original: えー「花に亡霊」を歌ったんですけども、どうでした？
subtitles.english: We sang "Ghost in a Flower," how was it?

subtitles.original: エモ！
subtitles.english: Emotional!

subtitles.original: いやエモ。このステージとすっごい合ってたし…
subtitles.english: No, emotional. It matched this stage perfectly, and...

subtitles.original: やっぱね、あのらでんちゃんに歌ってほしいパートがあったんですよ。
subtitles.english: There was a part I really wanted Raden-chan to sing.

subtitles.original: え？どこどこ？
subtitles.english: Eh? Where, where?

subtitles.original: 「歴史に残るものだけがすべてじゃない」っていうところで…
subtitles.english: The part "What remains in history isn't everything"...

subtitles.original: あ、これちょっとらでんちゃんに歌ってほしいなと思って…
subtitles.english: Ah, I thought I'd like Raden-chan to sing this...

subtitles.original: レパートリーをあげさせてもらいました。
subtitles.english: so I added it to the repertoire.

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！
subtitles.english: I'm happy!

subtitles.original: 私もどこかで歌いたいなーって思ってたから…
subtitles.english: Because I'd been thinking I wanted to sing it too...

subtitles.original: そう、この曲一緒に歌いたいんだって言ってくれた時、めちゃ嬉しい！と思って。
subtitles.english: Right, when you said you wanted to sing this together, I was so happy!

subtitles.original: よかったー。嬉しい。ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: I'm so glad. I'm happy. Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: じゃあ。頑張って帰ってね。
subtitles.english: Well then. Good luck getting back.

subtitles.original: こ、ここから？ここから？え？
subtitles.english: He- Here? From here? Eh?

subtitles.original: うわ！じゃ、じゃあ、ほな！ほな！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Well, then, see ya! See ya!

subtitles.original: これからも頑張ってください！
subtitles.english: Please keep doing your best!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！頑張ってください。
subtitles.english: Thank you! Please do your best.

subtitles.original: これどうやって帰るの？これどうやって帰るの？
subtitles.english: How do I get back? How do I get back?

subtitles.original: あ、あっち？あっち？…あ、あっち？
subtitles.english: Ah, that way? That way? ...Ah, that way?

subtitles.original: らでんちゃんありがとう！頑張ってください！バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Raden-chan, thank you! Do your best! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 愛して愛して愛して
subtitles.english: Love Me, Love Me, Love Me

subtitles.original: 作詞・作曲・きくお
subtitles.english: Lyrics & Composition: Kikuo

subtitles.original: 遥か遠い遠い昔　巻かれた首輪
subtitles.english: A collar wrapped around me in the distant, distant past

subtitles.original: 人が欲しい　人が欲しいと叫ぶ呪いの首輪
subtitles.english: A cursed collar that cries, "I want people, I want people"

subtitles.original: 怒らないで　見捨てないで　どこも行かないで
subtitles.english: Don't get angry, don't abandon me, don't go anywhere

subtitles.original: 強く締める　悪魔に締める　人がいない　いないと
subtitles.english: Tighten it strongly, tighten it by the devil, there are no people

subtitles.original: 良い成績でしょ？
subtitles.english: Good results, right?

subtitles.original: ねえ　ねえ　良い子でしょ？
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, I'm a good child, right?

subtitles.original: かわいい子でしょ？
subtitles.english: A cute child, right?

subtitles.original: ねえ　ねえ　良い子でしょ？
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, I'm a good child, right?

subtitles.original: 苦しいね
subtitles.english: It's painful, isn't it

subtitles.original: 愛して　愛して　愛して
subtitles.english: Love me, love me, love me

subtitles.original: もっと　もっと
subtitles.english: More and more

subtitles.original: 愛して　愛して
subtitles.english: Love me, love me

subtitles.original: 苦しいほどに
subtitles.english: Until it's painful

subtitles.original: 苦しい　苦しい
subtitles.english: Painful, painful

subtitles.original: 呪縛を
subtitles.english: The curse

subtitles.original: 解いて　解いて
subtitles.english: Undo it, undo it

subtitles.original: ねえ
subtitles.english: Hey

subtitles.original: 止められない　嗚呼
subtitles.english: I can't stop it, aa

subtitles.original: 体　体　大きくなっても小さい首輪
subtitles.english: Body, body, even as it grows, the collar is small

subtitles.original: 足りなくなる　足りなくなる　人が人が足りない
subtitles.english: It's not enough, not enough, people are not enough

subtitles.original: クラスの誰にも負けない綺麗ないい子でしょ
subtitles.english: I'm a beautiful, good child who won't lose to anyone, right?

subtitles.original: どこより　どの子より　誰も彼も私を見てよ
subtitles.english: More than anyone, more than any child, everyone look at me

subtitles.original: 体育館裏　あなたに告白を
subtitles.english: Behind the gym, a confession to you

subtitles.original: 嘘みたいでしょ？　あなたが好きなの
subtitles.english: It's like a lie, right? I love you

subtitles.original: 汚いあなたが
subtitles.english: You, who are filthy

subtitles.original: 愛して　愛して　愛して
subtitles.english: Love me, love me, love me

subtitles.original: 全部あげる　あなたに　あなたに
subtitles.english: I'll give it all to you, to you

subtitles.original: 全部背負ってもらうよ
subtitles.english: I'll have you shoulder it all

subtitles.original: 足りない　あなたが　足りない
subtitles.english: It's not enough, you are not enough

subtitles.original: 離さないよ　嗚呼
subtitles.english: I won't let you go, aa

subtitles.original: ごめんなさい
subtitles.english: I'm sorry

subtitles.english: Love me, love me, love me

subtitles.english: More and more

subtitles.english: Love me, love me

subtitles.english: I won't let go

subtitles.english: I'm happy, aa
